room.caption: [G5-4J] Sometimes I wondered if all I was really doing was getting Zephyr to change the game to suit my own tastes.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(49)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh13MainA) metroidControl=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh13MetroidControl)
global.currentBoss="" global.bossTrack=0
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(505) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
